title: CTO Hold Recommendation v2
recommendation_reason: CEO decision is DEFER_DECISION (day 3) and pair_count=0 < pair_target=200. Both unlock conditions unmet.
p18_blocked_reason: CEO pending AND forward accumulation insufficient (0/200).

unlock_conditions.condition_1: CEO replies APPROVE_PATH_A_WITH_API_KEY → P18 allowed for API key gate only
unlock_conditions.condition_2: forward pairs >= 200 → P18 allowed for CLV validation only
unlock_conditions.condition_3: CEO replies REJECT_PATH_A and pairs >= 200 → PATH B CLV only
